codeReview.summary: BashRiskLevel enum correctly classifies commands: cat/ls/grep/head/tail → Low risk, rm/chmod/chown/curl|bash/eval → High risk, unknown → Medium risk (safe default). Pipe chains use highest-risk component. 15 unit tests verify all classifications.

summary: Feature PASSED review. All 15 bash risk classification tests pass. Implementation correctly handles read-only, destructive, and unknown commands with correct risk levels.
